title: mulguraea aspera var. aspera
intro: Mulguraea aspera var. aspera is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. This plant has been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mulguraea aspera var. aspera include the potential relief of symptoms associated with colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which may aid in pain relief. Mulguraea aspera var. aspera is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
